# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      LOAD t1, [x]
      STORE t1, [a]
      LOAD t3, [x]
      STORE t3, [b]
      LOAD t5, [x]
      STORE t5, [c]
      LOAD t7, [x]
      STORE t7, [d]
      t10 = 0
      STORE t10, [e]
      t12 = 0
      STORE t12, [f]
      LOAD t13, [x]
      STORE t13, [g]
      LOAD t15, [x]
      LOAD t16, [x]
      t17 = SUB t15, t16
      STORE t17, [h]
      LOAD t18, [x]
      STORE t18, [i]
      LOAD t20, [a]
      LOAD t21, [b]
      t22 = ADD t20, t21
      LOAD t23, [c]
      t24 = ADD t22, t23
      LOAD t25, [d]
      t26 = ADD t24, t25
      LOAD t27, [e]
      t28 = ADD t26, t27
      LOAD t29, [f]
      t30 = ADD t28, t29
      LOAD t31, [g]
      t32 = ADD t30, t31
      LOAD t33, [h]
      t34 = ADD t32, t33
      LOAD t35, [i]
      t36 = ADD t34, t35
      RETURN t36

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t37 = CALL [test], 10
      RETURN t37
